# fetch-github-repo-info
Description: Fetches README content and file structure for multiple GitHub repositories using parallel processing.
Source: project
1. Provide a list of GitHub repositories, including the organization/user and repository names.
2. The system will divide the provided repositories into multiple batches.
3. Parallel sub-agents will be initiated to process each batch concurrently.
4. Each sub-agent will fetch the README content and file structure for the repositories in its assigned batch from GitHub.
5. A Personal Access Token (PAT) will be utilized for authentication, particularly when accessing private repositories.
6. Upon completion of all sub-agents, the results from each batch will be collected and unified into a single output.
